overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a desert-edge shantytown. The scene transitions from a hillside overlook down into narrow dirt streets between concrete and corrugated metal buildings, ending in a trash-filled alley with a burning fire.

events.description: begins descending the dirt slope into the settlement
moving from open hillside into the shantytown streets

agents.ego_description: walking down a dirt slope overlooking a shantytown settlement with futuristic skyline in the distance

entered.detail: multi-story concrete building with blue doors and graffiti on the lower level
tall cylindrical water tower with rust and antenna structures on top
futuristic glass skyscrapers visible through haze in the background
abandoned yellow vehicle with open doors and missing wheels
steep dirt and gravel path descending into the settlement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide panoramic view from a hillside overlooking a desert shantytown. The camera descends a dirt slope toward concrete buildings, with a rusted water tower and distant futuristic skyline visible ahead. An abandoned yellow car sits to the right as the path leads down into the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt street through concrete residential blocks

events.description: turning right to navigate through the settlement streets
camera passes close to concrete building wall on the right

agents.ego_description: navigating through the settlement streets, turning right and moving between concrete residential buildings

entered.detail: two-story concrete building with blue doors, external staircases, and air conditioning units
large reddish-brown rocky cliff face rising behind the buildings
corrugated metal roll-up door with graffiti on the adjacent wall
external air conditioning units mounted on the building facade

segments.scene_description: Moving through the settlement's dirt streets, the camera turns right between concrete residential buildings. The futuristic skyline shifts to the left while a red rock formation becomes visible on the right. The path narrows as the camera passes close to building walls with metal garage doors and external AC units.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with trash piles and burning debris

events.description: entering narrow alleyway between buildings with overhead concrete structures
approaching a burning trash pile with flames and rising smoke

agents.ego_description: moving through a narrow alleyway between buildings, passing trash piles and a burning barrel

entered.detail: piles of blue and black garbage bags accumulated along the alley wall
large fire burning in a barrel or trash pile with orange flames and black smoke
red and white striped plastic barrier with sandbags at the base
elevated concrete walkway or bridge structure spanning between buildings overhead

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into a narrow enclosed alleyway between concrete buildings. Trash bags pile up along the walls near a red and white construction barrier. A burning fire with visible flames appears on the right, illuminating the passage. An overhead concrete walkway spans the alley as the camera navigates through the cluttered space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide hillside overlook down into the claustrophobic, cluttered depths of a desert shantytown. It begins with a panoramic view of the settlement and a distant futuristic skyline, descending a dirt slope past a rusted water tower and an abandoned yellow car. As the camera enters the settlement, the open vista narrows into dirt streets where the skyline shifts left and a red rock formation emerges to the right. The path then tightens further, passing close to concrete walls with metal garage doors and AC units before turning into a confined alleyway. Finally, the scene closes in around piles of trash bags and a red and white construction barrier, moving under an overhead concrete walkway toward the glow of a burning fire.
